verses.text: Tua ciangin, tokhom tungah a tupa in a taklam khutah a tawi laizial tawn khat ka mu hi. Tua a laidal tung a langnih tuakah lai kigelhin a kizialcip khit ciangin a kiphel theihlohna dingin mun sagih-ah kiciamteh hi
Tua ciangin a thahat vantung mi khat ka mu a, amah in nakpi takin, “Hih laizial a ciamtehnate lakhia-in a laizial a phel dingin a kilawm kua om ahi hiam?” hong ci hi
Ahi zongin tua laizial a phel ding mi, vantung, leitung, leinuai-ah kuamah kimu lo hi
Tua laizial phelin a sung a en dingin a kilawm kuamah kimulo ahih manin nakpi takin ka kap hi

Tua laitakin upate khat in kei kiangah, “Kap kei in. Judah minam sung panin Humpinelkai, David suan sung panin a lianpa gualzo khinta a, tua laizial ciamtehna sagihte lakhia-in a laizial phelthei ding hi,” a hong ci hi

Tua upate' huamsung, ganhing lite leh kumpi tokhom kikalah Tuuno a ding ka mu hi. Tua Tuuno pen a kigo lumsa tawh kibang a, leitung khempeuhah a kisawlkhia, Pasian' khate' lim ahi ki sagih leh mittang sagih a nei hi
Tua Tuuno va pai a, tokhom tungah a tupa in a taklamah a tawi laizial a va la hi

Tua laizial a lak khit ciangin ganhing lite leh upa sawmnihlelite, Topa' mai-ah a kun uh hi. Amaute in harp lasakna khat ciat leh Pasian' mi siangthote in thungetna-in a zat uh paknamtui a dimin a om paknamtui beel khat ciat a tawi uh hi

Amaute in la thak khat sa uh a, “Nang Tuuno, tua laizial a lakhia ding leh a ciamtehnate a lakhia dingin na kilawm hi. Nang hong kigo khin ahih manin mi namkim leh pau namkim a pau mite sung panin na sisan tawh Pasian-a' dingin mite na lei khin a
Pasian' na a sem dingin siampi za leh kumpi za na pia a, amaute in leitung ukin a om ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin ka khuadak leh tokhom leh ganhing lite leh upate' kimkotah a tul a makin a ding miaimuai vantung mite' awging ka za hi
Amaute in nakpi takin la sa uh a, “A kigo Tuuno in vangliatna leh hauhna, pilna leh thahatna, pahtawina, minthan'na, leh phatna, a ngah dingin kilawm hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin vantung, leitung, leinuai, tuipi sung leh mun khempeuhah a om nuntakna a nei khempeuh in la a sakna uh ka za a, amaute in, “Tokhom tungah a tupa leh Tuuno in phatna, pahtawina, minthan'na leh vangliatna, ngah tawntung ta hen,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin ganhing lite in zong, “Amen,” na ci uh a, upate in zong khukdin'in Pasian a bia uh hi.
